title: pelargonium selinum
intro: Pelargonium selinum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Pelargonium selinum has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is valued for its ability to alleviate symptoms of the common cold, sore throats, and digestive issues, making it a natural remedy for respiratory and gastrointestinal health. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium selinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
